mapper.insert:
insert into Member( MEMBER_NO, id, pwd, nickname, email, phone ) values( MEMBER_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{id}, #{pwd}, #{nickName}, #{email}, #{phone}
)
mapper.select: select * from member where id=#{id} and status ='Y'
select *from member where id=#{id} and status ='Y'
SELECT ID FROM MEMBER WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND STATUS = 'Y'
